hooks.command: echo "💰 Mooney Finance App | Branch: $(git branch --show-current) | Uncommitted: $(git status --short | wc -l | tr -d ' ') files | Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo 'No commits')"

if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/composeApp/build.gradle.kts" ]; then echo "📱 Android SDK: $(grep 'compileSdk' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/composeApp/build.gradle.kts" | grep -o '[0-9]*' | head -1) | Kotlin: $(grep 'kotlin' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/gradle/libs.versions.toml" | grep -o '[0-9]\.[0-9]\.[0-9]*' | head -1)"; fi

CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(push\s+--force|push\s+-f\b|reset\s+--hard|clean\s+-f|checkout\s+\.|restore\s+\.|branch\s+-D|rm\s+-rf\s+[^/])'; then echo '🛑 BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Ask the user for confirmation first.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then KT_FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' '\n' | grep '\.kt$' | head -1); if grep -nE '\b(print\(|println\()' "$KT_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️  Direct print/println detected. Use proper logging instead.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then KT_FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' '\n' | grep '\.kt$' | head -1); if grep -nE 'collectAsState\(\)' "$KT_FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'collectAsStateWithLifecycle'; then echo '⚠️  collectAsState() detected. Use collectAsStateWithLifecycle() instead for lifecycle awareness.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'ViewModel.*\.kt$'; then echo '⚙️  ViewModel modified - Remember to:'; echo '  1. Update unit tests in commonTest/'; echo '  2. Register in Modules.kt if new'; echo '  3. Handle all state transitions'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'Screen\.kt$'; then echo '🎨 Screen modified - Ensure:'; echo '  1. @Preview composable exists'; echo '  2. Dark mode supported'; echo '  3. Accessibility labels added'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then KT_FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ':' '\n' | grep '\.kt$' | head -1); if grep -E 'catch.*Exception.*\{' "$KT_FILE" | grep -v 'CancellationException' 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️  Generic exception catch detected. Always rethrow CancellationException in coroutines!'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'ViewModel.*\.kt$'; then echo '✨ New ViewModel created! Next steps:'; echo '  1. Register in Modules.kt (sharedModule)'; echo '  2. Create unit tests in commonTest/'; echo '  3. Add to NavigationHost'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'UseCase.*\.kt$'; then echo '✨ New UseCase created! Next steps:'; echo '  1. Register in Modules.kt'; echo '  2. Add unit tests'; echo '  3. Inject into ViewModel'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'Screen\.kt$'; then echo '✨ New Screen created! Checklist:'; echo '  1. Add @Preview composable'; echo '  2. Wire up in NavigationHost'; echo '  3. Test dark mode'; echo '  4. Add content descriptions'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'Entity\.kt$'; then echo '🗄️  Database entity modified - Remember to:'; echo '  1. Update Room migration if schema changed'; echo '  2. Increment database version'; echo '  3. Test migration on existing data'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '^\./gradlew.*test'; then echo '🧪 Running tests... Good practice! Consider also:'; echo '  ./gradlew koverHtmlReport - for coverage report'; fi
echo "🏁 Subagent completed. Consider running: ./gradlew test"
